priority_actions.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
Lean into service & hospitality — it's what guests are buying

watch_items.title: Monitor local competitor openings and closures

implementation_framework.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
implementation_framework.success_measure: GBP completeness ≥ 9/10 with menu and hours complete (verifiable via API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Open your Google Maps listing on your phone. Check: (1) hours for all 7 days, (2) menu link works, (3) phone number dials correctly, (4) website loads. Fix any gaps via business.google.com
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: operations — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Lean into service & hospitality — it's what guests are buying
implementation_framework.expected_upside: Sharpen proposition → attract the right guests
implementation_framework.success_measure: Service-related praise maintained in next review sample (verifiable via sentiment)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Update your GBP description and website homepage to lead with what guests actually praise: service quality and hospitality
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: management — FOH lead or general manager

implementation_framework.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
implementation_framework.success_measure: Google rating maintained or improved vs current baseline (verifiable via gr field)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Respond to the 3 most recent Google reviews (positive and negative) this week. Set a weekly review-response routine
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: front-of-house — whoever currently responds to online reviews

implementation_framework.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
implementation_framework.success_measure: Menu URL present in GBP profile (verifiable via Google Places API)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Log into business.google.com → select venue → Info → Menu URL → paste link to your current menu page on your website
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: marketing — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
implementation_framework.success_measure: Google review count increased by 10+ (verifiable via grc field)
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Identify the single most actionable sub-task and assign it to a named person with a deadline
implementation_framework.owner_guidance: marketing — whoever holds Google Business Profile admin access

implementation_framework.title: Pursue editorial recognition
implementation_framework.success_measure: Signal improvement detectable in next month's data collection
implementation_framework.next_milestone: Identify the single most actionable sub-task and assign it to a named person with a deadline

implementation_framework.success_measure: Signal improvement detectable in next month's data collection

couples.label: Couples & Occasion Diners

top_praise.example_quote: We did not have a booking, and it was packed
We did not have a booking, and it was packed
We did not have a booking, and it was packed

couples.commercial_note: Occasion diners have high expectations and long memories. A great experience generates word-of-mouth; a disappointing one generates damaging reviews.

data_quality.note: Honest segment attribution from keyword evidence. Reviews without clear guest-type signals are unattributed.

subcomponents.label: Inspection Recency
subcomponents.interpretation: Last inspected 2026-02-12 (2 months ago). Full confidence. No action needed.

subcomponents.label: Structural Compliance
subcomponents.interpretation: Strong — premises, facilities, equipment all adequate.

subcomponents.label: Confidence in Management
subcomponents.interpretation: Strong management systems and training record.

biggest_drag.label: Inspection Recency
biggest_drag.interpretation: Last inspected 2026-02-12 (2 months ago). Full confidence. No action needed.

headline_gap.gap_explanation: Headline and trust score are well-aligned.

reinspection.reasoning: Your inspection is 2 months old (fresh tier). The recency decay is costing you ~0.3 points on trust.
reinspection.cost_context: Voluntary reinspection is free via local authority request. Typical wait: 4–8 weeks.
reinspection.risk_note: Only request reinspection if confident of maintaining 5/5. A drop to 4 would be worse than the staleness drag.

trust_building_actions.action: Add FSA rating to Google Business Profile
Mention compliance in review responses where relevant

commercial_exposure.scenario: If a customer is choosing between you and a competitor with a fresher inspection record, the competitor's recency is a tiebreaker — especially for risk-averse bookers (families, corporate groups, tourists checking hygiene ratings).
commercial_exposure.basis: Trust gap unlikely to drive direct revenue loss at 5/5 headline, but creates competitive vulnerability. Value is defensive — preventing loss if headline drops or competitor highlights their fresher record.

upside_if_fixed.risk: Only request reinspection if confident of maintaining 5/5. A drop to 4 would be worse than the staleness drag.

tier_1_deep_analysis.description: Full text analysed — aspect tagging, sentiment, segment classification
tier_1_deep_analysis.what_this_tells_you: Detailed theme and sentiment patterns from recent guests. Strong for identifying specific issues and praise points. Not a census.
tier_1_deep_analysis.confidence: High for recent themes, moderate for long-term patterns

tier_2_aggregate_signals.description: Rating and volume statistics — no text analysis
tier_2_aggregate_signals.rating_stability: A 4.5/5 across 1,988 reviews is extremely stable — individual reviews have negligible impact on the aggregate.
tier_2_aggregate_signals.what_this_tells_you: Overall reputation trajectory. A 4.5/5 across 1,988 reviews is extremely stable — individual reviews have negligible impact on the aggregate.
tier_2_aggregate_signals.confidence: High for reputation baseline, cannot identify specific themes

tier_3_structural_signals.description: Non-review data — FSA, GBP completeness, operational signals
tier_3_structural_signals.what_this_tells_you: Compliance, discoverability, and operational readiness. Independent of guest opinion.
